metadata.title: Laveina — Smart Parcel Delivery
metadata.description: Shop-to-shop parcel delivery platform. Book, track, and manage shipments across partner pickup points.

hero.headline: Fast, reliable parcel delivery across Spain
hero.subtext: From 48 hours. Next Day available in Barcelona.
hero.imageAlt: Laveina courier holding a parcel beside a delivery van

home.subtitle: Smart Parcel Delivery — Shop to Shop
home.convenientDesc: Drop off and collect from local pickup points.

pricingSection.title: Service & Pricing Details
pricingSection.description: You can choose the delivery timeframe that best fits your schedule and budget whether you need lightning-fast express same-day service for urgent shipments or a more affordable economy shipping option for cost-effective delivery.

whyChooseUs.description: Major business transitions require more than transaction support—they demand clarity, trust, and experienced judgment.
whyChooseUs.imageAlt: Woman using her phone surrounded by Laveina's core values: Tech-Driven, Eco-Friendly, Transparent, and Secure

pickupPointsNetwork.title: Pickup Points Network
pickupPointsNetwork.subtitle: Find your nearest pickup point and enjoy fast, convenient parcel delivery and collection across our growing network of partner locations.
pickupPointsNetwork.mapAlt: Coverage map showing pickup point network area

ecoPartner.title: Eco Partner
ecoPartner.subtitle: Structured Business Collaboration
ecoPartner.description: Our Eco Partner Program is a fully structured service offering — not just delivery. We collaborate closely with restaurants and retail brands to integrate sustainable packaging, optimize logistics, and showcase measurable environmental impact.
ecoPartner.imageAlt: Delivery partner and customer shaking hands

cta.description: Move your package across the city with speed, clarity, & confidence.
cta.imageAlt: Laveina scooter and branded delivery van ready for shipment

footer.tagline: Fast, reliable parcel delivery across Spain through our pickup point network.
footer.carrierDisclaimer: Laveina operates in partnership with certified carriers for nationwide delivery.

aboutPage.heroSubtitle: We're building the logistics infrastructure that puts people first — connecting communities through a smarter, more sustainable delivery network across Spain.
aboutPage.missionText: To transform parcel delivery by eliminating failed deliveries, reducing urban congestion, and making logistics accessible to everyone — through a growing network of trusted pickup points.
aboutPage.storyText1: Laveina was born from a simple frustration: missed deliveries, endless rescheduling, and packages left at uncertain locations. We knew there had to be a better way.
aboutPage.storyText2: We built a pickup-point network that puts control back in your hands. Drop off and collect parcels on your schedule, at verified locations near you — no waiting at home, no missed attempts.
aboutPage.storyText3: Starting in Barcelona with our own drivers and expanding across Spain through smart carrier partnerships, we're creating a delivery experience that works for real life.
aboutPage.valueReliabilityDesc: Every parcel is tracked, verified, and secured with OTP. Zero failed deliveries — that's our standard.
aboutPage.valueSustainabilityDesc: Consolidated deliveries to pickup points mean fewer vehicles on the road and a smaller carbon footprint.
aboutPage.valueSimplicityDesc: Book in seconds, track in real time, collect when it suits you. Logistics shouldn't be complicated.
aboutPage.valueTransparencyDesc: Clear pricing, real-time status updates, and no hidden fees. You always know where your parcel is.
aboutPage.networkSubtitle: A growing ecosystem of verified pickup points and smart logistics.
aboutPage.ctaSubtitle: Whether you're sending a parcel or want to become a pickup point partner, we'd love to hear from you.

contactPage.heroSubtitle: Have a question, suggestion, or want to partner with us? We'd love to hear from you.
contactPage.messagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help...
contactPage.successText: Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contactPage.faq1Answer: Within Barcelona, deliveries are completed within 24–48 hours. For the rest of Spain, standard shipping takes 2–4 business days, and express shipping arrives within 24 hours.
contactPage.faq2Question: How do I track my parcel?
contactPage.faq2Answer: Use your unique tracking number on our tracking page to see real-time updates at every stage of the journey.
contactPage.faq3Question: What if I have an issue with my shipment?
contactPage.faq3Answer: Contact us through this form or email us directly. Our team typically responds within a few hours during business days.
contactPage.faq4Question: Can I become a pickup point partner?
contactPage.faq4Answer: Yes! If you own a local business and want to join our network, select 'Partnership Opportunity' in the subject field and tell us about your location.

whyChoosePage.heroSubtitle: The logistics infrastructure designed to serve you and simplify your life with every shipment.
whyChoosePage.technologyDesc: A system that connects our entire network of pickup points across Spain. It eliminates delays, manual processes, and human errors — everything automated, everything connected.
whyChoosePage.technologyFeature1: Manage shipments in seconds from any device
whyChoosePage.technologyFeature2: Real-time tracking and automatic route optimization
whyChoosePage.technologyFeature3: Platform available 24/7, no calls or waiting
whyChoosePage.sustainabilityDesc: Our pickup point model reduces unnecessary trips, eliminates failed deliveries, and groups shipments intelligently.
whyChoosePage.sustainabilityFeature2: Less urban traffic and lower fuel consumption
whyChoosePage.transparencyDesc: Full visibility from pickup to delivery. Real-time notifications at every stage for you and your customers.
whyChoosePage.securityDesc: Advanced OTP verification ensures only the authorized person collects the shipment. Verified pickup points with strict controls.
whyChoosePage.securityFeature1: Unique OTP code per delivery — no exceptions
whyChoosePage.securityFeature3: Optional insurance adapted to your package value
whyChoosePage.promiseText: Your package arrives safe, protected, and under full control at all times.
whyChoosePage.ctaSubtitle: Simple, fast, and stress-free — that's modern logistics.

pricing.title: Pricing & Services
pricing.subtitle: Laveina offers two shipping modes: an internal network for Barcelona and an external carrier (SendCloud) for the rest of Spain.
pricing.barcelonaDesc: Shipments between pickup points within Barcelona (08xxx postcodes). Fixed price by parcel size.
pricing.spainDesc: Shipments to any pickup point in Spain. Rate calculated in real time with the cheapest carrier.
pricing.insuranceNote: €25 basic coverage included on all shipments. Additional options available in the booking form.
pricing.speedUnavailable: The selected delivery speed is not available for this route
pricing.sendcloudUnavailable: Shipping rates are temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly.

shipmentConfirmation.subject: Shipment Confirmed — {trackingId}
shipmentConfirmation.body:
Your shipment has been successfully created with Laveina.

Tracking ID: {trackingId}
Pickup Point: {origin}
Destination: {destination}
Delivery Type: {deliveryType}
Amount Paid: €{price}

We will notify you when your parcel is in transit, arrives at destination, and is ready for pickup.

Track your shipment

receiverBookingNotification.subject: You have a parcel on the way! — {trackingId}
receiverBookingNotification.body:
{senderName} has sent you a parcel via Laveina.

Tracking ID: {trackingId}
From: {originName}
To: {destinationName}, {destinationAddress}

We will notify you when your parcel is in transit, arrives at destination, and is ready for pickup.

When it arrives at {destinationName}, we'll send you a one-time pickup code.

Track your parcel

receivedAtOrigin.body: Your parcel is now at {shopName} and will start its route shortly.

inTransit.subject: Parcel {trackingId} is on its way

readyForPickup.subject: Parcel {trackingId} is ready to collect
readyForPickup.body: Your parcel is waiting at {shopName}, {shopAddress}. You'll receive a one-time code by WhatsApp when you arrive at the shop.

deliveryToSender.subject: Parcel {trackingId} delivered
deliveryToSender.body: Your parcel has been delivered successfully.

We've delivered your parcel. Thanks for using Laveina.

Rate your experience — takes less than 30 seconds and helps us improve.

ecoPartnerPage.heroSubtitle: The certification that transforms your logistics into a brand asset
ecoPartnerPage.heroP1: At LAVEINA we understand that the future of logistics is not measured solely by speed, but by the impact each operation generates. Modern companies no longer seek just to deliver faster, but to do so intelligently, efficiently and responsibly.
ecoPartnerPage.heroP2: That's why Eco Partner was created — a program designed to transform logistics into a clean, optimized and measurable system. It's not an additional service, but a complete evolution in the way your company manages its shipments.
ecoPartnerPage.heroP3: Through advanced technology, operational control and strategic optimization, we turn every shipment into a more efficient and sustainable operation. This allows you to reduce emissions, improve processes and strengthen your company's image as a modern and committed organization.
ecoPartnerPage.heroHighlight: Eco Partner is not a trend — it's a real competitive advantage. It's the step toward smarter, cleaner logistics, ready for the future.
ecoPartnerPage.freeTitle: Start risk-free — Your first shipment is free
ecoPartnerPage.freeP1: We know that the first step always raises doubts. That's why at LAVEINA we eliminate them completely.
ecoPartnerPage.freeP2: All companies joining the Eco Partner program will receive their first shipment completely free, with no commitment and no fine print. A real opportunity to experience the difference before making any decision.
ecoPartnerPage.freeHighlight: Try Eco Partner for free — your first shipment at no cost, no commitment.
ecoPartnerPage.freeP3: You don't need to sign contracts. You don't need to make big changes. Just try it, feel the difference and decide with real information in hand.
ecoPartnerPage.integrationP1: Every company has unique operations, which is why at LAVEINA we design completely tailored solutions. We analyze your entire logistics chain: origin, routes, shipment frequency and volume, to identify real improvement opportunities.
ecoPartnerPage.integrationP2: We apply advanced route optimization to reduce unnecessary trips, minimize fuel consumption and increase efficiency per journey. Additionally, we reorganize logistics flows to consolidate shipments and reduce the total number of operations.
ecoPartnerPage.integrationP3: We also integrate proximity-based models and strategic points that shorten distances and improve delivery times.
ecoPartnerPage.integrationResult: The result is more efficient, faster logistics with lower environmental impact — without increasing operational complexity.
ecoPartnerPage.electricP1: At LAVEINA, our commitment to sustainability is not just a statement — it's a real and tangible operational decision.
ecoPartnerPage.electricP2: All delivery operations within the Eco Partner program are carried out exclusively with a 100% electric vehicle fleet, with zero emissions, zero noise and zero negative impact on the cities where we operate.
ecoPartnerPage.electricP3: This means that every shipment your company manages through LAVEINA is a zero carbon emissions shipment — which will appear directly in your periodic environmental reports and in your Eco Partner certification.
ecoPartnerPage.electricWhyTitle: Why is this important for your company?
ecoPartnerPage.electricBenefit1: Real and measurable reduction of your carbon footprint
ecoPartnerPage.electricBenefit2: Compliance with increasingly strict European environmental regulations
ecoPartnerPage.electricBenefit3: Powerful message for your customers: your company doesn't just talk, it acts
ecoPartnerPage.electricBenefit4: Real differentiation in a market where most use traditional vehicles
ecoPartnerPage.electricClosing: With LAVEINA, every delivery is a step toward a cleaner city and a more responsible business.
ecoPartnerPage.packagingP1: Packaging represents a significant part of the environmental impact in logistics. At LAVEINA we help companies optimize this phase with smart and sustainable solutions.
ecoPartnerPage.packagingP2: We analyze your products and propose packaging alternatives that reduce volume, weight and unnecessary materials — such as recycled boxes, biodegradable materials and elimination of unnecessary plastics — always maintaining adequate product protection.
ecoPartnerPage.packagingP3: Additionally, we work on standardizing packaging processes within your company, which improves internal efficiency, reduces errors and optimizes preparation times.
ecoPartnerPage.packagingResult: The result is a more efficient packaging system, with lower operational cost and lower environmental impact, aligned with current market expectations.
ecoPartnerPage.certTitle: The certification you can see — on your door and on your website
ecoPartnerPage.certIntro: This is the heart of the Eco Partner program.
ecoPartnerPage.certP1: When your company joins LAVEINA Eco Partner, you don't receive a simple document — you receive an official certification that becomes a visible, tangible and differentiating element for your brand.
ecoPartnerPage.certPhysicalP1: An official plaque with the Eco Partner LAVEINA seal is installed at the entrance or facade of your business:
ecoPartnerPage.certPhysicalQuote: Company committed to sustainable logistics — Eco Partner LAVEINA
ecoPartnerPage.certPhysicalP2: This physical seal communicates to every customer who enters your door that your company operates with responsibility, efficiency and vision for the future. It's an immediate, visible and powerful trust element.
ecoPartnerPage.certDigitalTitle: Digital badge for your online presence:
ecoPartnerPage.certDigitalP1: In addition to the physical seal, you receive an official digital badge that you can integrate into:
ecoPartnerPage.certDigitalP2: Every time a customer visits your website, receives an email from you or sees your professional profile, they see that your company is certified as a sustainable logistics operator. This generates trust, differentiation and brand positioning with no additional effort.
ecoPartnerPage.certHighlight: It's not just a certification. It's a sustainable marketing tool that pays for itself.
ecoPartnerPage.monitorP1: Along with the certification, LAVEINA provides periodic and detailed reports that include:
ecoPartnerPage.monitorItem3: Evolution of environmental performance over time
ecoPartnerPage.monitorItem4: Industry comparison to visualize your position
ecoPartnerPage.monitorP2: It's not just a statement, but a measurable and verifiable system that brings credibility and real value to your company — with concrete data you can share with your customers, partners and stakeholders.
ecoPartnerPage.brandP1: Today, companies don't compete on price or speed alone — they compete on values.
ecoPartnerPage.brandP2: Eco Partner allows you to position your brand as a responsible, innovative company aligned with the future. The 'Clean Footprint Carrier' seal visible on your establishment and digital presence becomes a differentiating element that reinforces your customers' trust in every interaction.
ecoPartnerPage.brandP3: This positioning not only improves the perception of your brand, but also opens opportunities with partners, corporate clients and projects that value sustainability as a key selection criterion.
ecoPartnerPage.brandHighlight: With LAVEINA, your logistics goes from being an operational cost to a strategic brand asset — visible, measurable and differentiating.
ecoPartnerPage.whyIntro: Because the market is evolving and companies that adapt first are the ones that lead.
ecoPartnerPage.benefit1: Free first shipment with no commitment
ecoPartnerPage.benefit3: Greater operational efficiency from day one
ecoPartnerPage.benefit4: Cost reduction in the medium term
ecoPartnerPage.benefit5: Official certification with physical seal at your establishment
ecoPartnerPage.benefit6: Digital badge for web, email and social media
ecoPartnerPage.benefit8: Improved brand image with customers and partners
ecoPartnerPage.benefit10: Clear and sustainable competitive advantage over time
ecoPartnerPage.ctaTitle: Join Eco Partner and transform your logistics into a clean, efficient strategic advantage ready for the future.
ecoPartnerPage.ctaSubtitle: Your first shipment is free. Your brand image, forever.
ecoPartnerPage.contactAddress: Rambla de l'Exposició 103, Planta 1 - Local, 08800 Vilanova i la Geltrú, Barcelona, Spain

howItWorks.heroSubtitle: Smart logistics based on total control
howItWorks.heroDescription: At LAVEINA, we don't offer a traditional courier service — but a comprehensive logistics system that combines technology and field execution to guarantee speed, precision and transparency in every operation.
howItWorks.heroModelsIntro: We work with two distinct models, each designed for real-world use:
howItWorks.heroModelIndividuals: For individuals → Pickup point network + OTP verification
howItWorks.heroModelBusiness: For businesses → Direct address-to-address delivery + electronic signature
howItWorks.individualsSubtitle: Pickup point network — total flexibility with no waiting
howItWorks.individualsDescription: No more waiting at home for the courier. LAVEINA relies on a network of pickup points distributed across the city, allowing you to drop off and collect your parcels whenever it suits you — no pressure and no fixed schedules.
howItWorks.individualsExample: Want to send a parcel to a friend? Drop it off at the nearest point to you, and they pick it up with their OTP code whenever it suits them. Simple, fast and no waiting.
howItWorks.individualsStep1Desc: From laveina.co, select: drop-off point (nearest to you), pickup point (nearest to the recipient) and parcel size. The price appears instantly, clear and transparent — no hidden costs.
howItWorks.individualsStep2Desc: Complete the payment directly on the platform in a single step. Upon confirmation, you receive the shipment details instantly, ready to use.
howItWorks.individualsStep3Desc: Go to the selected point whenever you want — no appointment needed. Drop off the parcel and you'll receive immediate confirmation.
howItWorks.individualsStep4Desc: Track your shipment in real time from drop-off to delivery — clear visibility at every stage.
howItWorks.individualsStep5Desc: When the parcel arrives at the destination point, the recipient receives a personal OTP code directly via WhatsApp. Enter the code at the pickup point to verify their identity and collect the parcel securely and accurately.
howItWorks.individualsOtpDesc: Because everyone uses it — no need for any additional app or email. The code arrives instantly and guarantees that only the right person picks up the parcel — total protection for the sender and recipient.
howItWorks.individualsJourney: Create → Pay → Drop off at point → Transport → Pickup via OTP
howItWorks.businessSubtitle: Direct address-to-address delivery — smart scheduling and total control
howItWorks.businessDescription: A direct logistics system designed to support daily operations and future expansion with high efficiency. It's based on door-to-door delivery — ideal for businesses that need speed, organization and total control over every shipment.
howItWorks.businessStep1Desc: Through the control panel or via API integration, specifying: pickup address and delivery address, pickup time and desired delivery time.
howItWorks.businessStep2Desc: Schedule your shipments in advance, daily or weekly, to organize operations and improve operational efficiency.
howItWorks.businessStep3Desc: The courier arrives directly at your address at the agreed time — no delays, no surprises.
howItWorks.businessStep4Desc: Complete visibility of every shipment at every stage within the LAVEINA system.
howItWorks.businessStep5Desc: At the moment of delivery, the recipient signs electronically as an official and verified proof.
howItWorks.businessSignatureDesc: It provides immediate legal proof, reduces disputes and offers the company a level of professionalism befitting its operations.
howItWorks.businessCoverage1: Within Barcelona — direct and agile execution with the highest quality level
howItWorks.businessCoverage2: Outside Barcelona — coverage across all of Spain with the same performance and reliability standards
howItWorks.businessJourney: Create → Pickup at address → Tracking → Delivery → Electronic signature
howItWorks.comparisonProblem1: Waiting at home for the courier
howItWorks.comparisonSolution1: Flexible pickup point network for individuals
howItWorks.comparisonSolution5: A single platform that manages everything
howItWorks.comparisonSolution6: Scalable system with no added complexity
howItWorks.ctaIndividuals: For individuals — Send your first parcel in less than 3 minutes
howItWorks.ctaBusiness: For businesses — Request a personalized proposal for your operations

customerSupport.title: Support
customerSupport.subtitle: Talk to us — we usually reply within one business day.
customerSupport.whatsappSubtitle: Fastest — replies within minutes during business hours.
customerSupport.liveChatSubtitle: Start a live chat from here or the bubble on any page.

tracking.q: How do I track my parcel?
tracking.a: Every parcel has a tracking ID in the form LAV-XXXX-XXXX. Go to Track on the homepage or to My Shipments in your dashboard and paste it in.

cancellation.a: Yes, until you drop the parcel off at the origin pickup point. Open the shipment from My Shipments and use the cancel option. Once we scan it in at the origin shop, the parcel is already in transit and can no longer be cancelled.

lostParcel.q: What if my parcel is lost or damaged?
lostParcel.a: Let us know within 48 hours and we'll open an incident report. If the parcel was insured we'll refund the declared value plus the shipping cost.

changeAddress.q: Can I change the destination once the parcel is booked?
changeAddress.a: Not directly — cancel the booking before drop-off and create a new one. The refund is instant.
